title: rubus cuspidiferus subsp. lepidus
intro: Rubus cuspidiferus subsp. lepidus, also known as the Mountain Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Rubus cuspidiferus subsp. lepidus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and provide relief from symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
